name: Happy Fisherman
short_description: This is a fishing, fish farming casual game. Experience the fun of fishing in the game, earn gold to build a beautiful fish tank.
detailed_description:
This is a fishing, fish farming casual game.
Players catch fish by fishing and grow them to sell or fulfill orders to earn gold coins.
Coins can unlock new waters and catch more advanced species of fish. You can upgrade your fishing rod, buy bait, and increase your chances of catching fish. You can also buy fish tanks to raise fish, change the decorations of your fish tank, expand your fish tank, buy fish food, and upgrade your fish tank.
In the game, customers place orders, and the prices of the orders are higher than the market price of fish. Completing orders can earn you more gold coins.
Experience the joy of fishing in the game and create a beautiful fish tank.
